name: copilot-cursor-proxy
description: Proxy that bridges GitHub Copilot API to Cursor IDE — translates Anthropic format, bridges Responses API for GPT 5.x, and more

scripts.build: bun build start.ts proxy-router.ts anthropic-transforms.ts responses-bridge.ts responses-converters.ts stream-proxy.ts debug-logger.ts --outdir dist --target node
